strategy.name: VWAP + RSI(3) + EMA(50) Scalping Strategy — Valentini Enhanced
strategy.description: Base strategy: EMA(50) for trend direction (EMA(8) retired after validation), VWAP for session bias, RSI(3) for entry timing. Enhanced with Fabio Valentini's auction-market layers: Location (trade only at volume-profile levels), Aggression (volume/delta must confirm the entry), absorption detection, and a consecutive-loss circuit breaker.

indicators.ema_50: Trend direction. Price above EMA(50) = bullish momentum. Below = bearish. (Replaced EMA(8): 30 days of 1m data showed RSI(3)<30 while price holds above EMA(8) occurs zero times — the v1 gate made the strategy untradeable.)
indicators.vwap: Session bias. Price above VWAP = buyers in control. Below = sellers. Resets at midnight UTC.
indicators.rsi_3: Entry timing. RSI on 3 candles only — extremely sensitive. Below 30 in an uptrend = snap-back setup. Above 70 in a downtrend = reversal likely.
indicators.volume_profile: Location filter. Previous session's price-volume histogram → POC (highest-volume price), VAH/VAL (edges of the 70% value area). Entries are only valid near these levels; POC is the profit target.
indicators.delta_approx: Aggression proxy from OHLCV: volume weighted by where the close sits in the candle range. Positive = buyers aggressive, negative = sellers aggressive.
indicators.absorption: Volume > 2.0x its 20-bar average while candle range < 0.3x ATR(14). Big volume that can't move price = passive institutional absorption — likely turn.

long: Price is above VWAP — buyers in control for the session
Price is above EMA(50) — uptrend confirmed
RSI(3) has dropped below 30 — short-term pullback in an uptrend, snap-back likely
LOCATION: price is within 0.25% of a volume-profile level (POC, VAH, or VAL from the previous session) — no level, no trade
AGGRESSION: trigger candle's approximated delta is positive AND its volume is above the 20-bar average — buyers actually stepping in
short: Price is below VWAP — sellers in control
Price is below EMA(50) — downtrend confirmed
RSI(3) has spiked above 70 — overbought in a downtrend, reversal likely
LOCATION: price is within 0.25% of a volume-profile level (POC, VAH, or VAL from the previous session) — no level, no trade
AGGRESSION: trigger candle's approximated delta is negative AND its volume is above the 20-bar average — sellers actually stepping in

exit_rules: Primary target: previous session's POC, or 2x the stop distance (whichever is nearer) — minimum 2:1 reward-to-risk
Hard stop: 0.3% below entry for longs, 0.3% above entry for shorts
Early exit: absorption candle printing against the position (high volume, no price progress) — institutions are on the other side
Fallback: exit when RSI(3) crosses back above 50 (for longs) or below 50 (for shorts) with the position in profit
risk_rules: Risk maximum 0.5% of portfolio per trade (Valentini risks 0.25% — use that once live)
CIRCUIT BREAKER: stop trading for the day after 3 losing trades — no exceptions
Maximum trade size capped by MAX_TRADE_SIZE_USD in .env
Maximum trades per day capped by MAX_TRADES_PER_DAY in .env
Do not trade if price is more than 1.5% away from VWAP — overextended
Only trade when the rolling 1-hour volume is above the 24-hour median — dead sessions produce fake signals
Paper trade first — validate this strategy on your specific asset before going live
notes: Scalping strategy — designed for 1m to 5m timeframes. RSI(3) is intentionally fast and sensitive. Do not apply to higher timeframes. The Location and Aggression layers come from Fabio Valentini's auction-market framework (Chart Fanatics episode, Sep 2025): direction first, then location, then aggression — skip any trade missing one of the three. VALIDATION (18 Jul 2026, 30 days BTCUSDT 1m + 5m, 0.05%/side fees): the original EMA(8) gate produced ZERO trades (mathematically near-impossible combo). With the EMA(50) gate the base strategy trades but has NEGATIVE edge (-76.7% on 1m, -25.4% on 5m — fee attrition dominates). The Valentini layers cut the bleed to -1.5%/-1.0% but cannot make a negative edge positive. DO NOT TRADE THIS LIVE. Paper-only R&D until a variant shows positive expectancy over 90+ days. Backtest: node backtest-scalp.js <csv>.
